brand-html.desc: General branded HTML deliverable on the MetodologIA Design System.

html-brand.desc: Self-contained single-file HTML deliverable, CSS inline, WCAG AA, MetodologIA DS.

brand-docx.desc: Editable Word/DOCX document on brand tokens (python-docx).

brand-xlsx.desc: Branded Excel/XLSX workbook with brand styling and tokens.

brand-pdf.desc: Print-ready PDF rendered deterministically from brand HTML (Chrome print-to-pdf).

brand-art.desc: Brand vector art/SVG: heroes, spot illustration, icons, OG cards (flat, faceless figures).

xlsx-template-creator.desc: Reusable branded XLSX template with named styles. [EXPLICIT]

branded-html-output.desc: Apply brand tokens to existing HTML output.
